description: HSN (Harmonized System of Nomenclature) codes — STARTER PLACEHOLDER covering a small illustrative set of common codes. This file is NOT a usable top-2000 HSN reference and MUST be replaced before production use.
source: PLACEHOLDER — needs authoritative sourcing from CBIC GST rate schedule (https://cbic-gst.gov.in/gst-goods-services-rates.html) and the GST Council's approved HSN rate schedule
notes: This file exists so the khata-standard repo can be bootstrapped with a non-empty hsn/ directory and so Bahi can be developed against the expected schema. The entries here are a tiny sample of commonly-encountered HSN codes across major categories (textiles, electronics, food, machinery, services via SAC). The goal for a real release is a curated top-2000 HSN set representing ~95% of SMB transaction volume. Sourcing this set requires either scraping the CBIC rate schedule, purchasing a compliance database, or partnering with an existing tool that has already done the work. Until then, Bahi should flag unknown HSN codes as 'not in bundled set' and prompt the user to enter rate manually. Rate assignments shown here are as of current knowledge but every HSN rate should be re-verified against the latest CBIC rate schedule before use.

entries.description: Milk and cream, not concentrated nor containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
entries.note: Fresh milk exempt; UHT and flavoured milk may be taxed
Unbranded rice exempt; pre-packaged and labelled rice subject to 5% effective July 2022

entries.description: Bread, pastry, cakes, biscuits and other bakers' wares
entries.note: Branded bread may be exempt; biscuits 18%

entries.description: Medicaments consisting of mixed or unmixed products for therapeutic or prophylactic uses, put up in measured doses or in forms or packings for retail sale
entries.note: Many medicines at 12%; life-saving drugs at 5% or exempt

entries.description: Registers, account books, note books, order books, receipt books, letter pads, memorandum pads, diaries and similar articles
Men's or boys' suits, ensembles, jackets, blazers, trousers, bib and brace overalls, breeches and shorts (other than swimwear)
Women's or girls' suits, ensembles, jackets, blazers, dresses, skirts, divided skirts, trousers, bib and brace overalls, breeches and shorts (other than swimwear)
Automatic data processing machines and units thereof; magnetic or optical readers, machines for transcribing data onto data media in coded form and machines for processing such data
entries.note: Includes desktop computers, laptops, servers, and accessories

entries.description: Telephone sets, including smartphones and other telephones for cellular networks or for other wireless networks
entries.note: Mobile phones moved from 12% to 18% effective April 2020

entries.description: Monitors and projectors, not incorporating television reception apparatus; reception apparatus for television

sacPlaceholders.description: Management consulting and management services including financial, strategic, human resources, marketing, operations and supply chain management
Information technology (IT) consulting and support services
Other professional, technical and business services n.e.c.
Events, exhibitions, conferences and meetings assistance services

sacPlaceholders.note: Many educational services are exempt; verify per exact nature
